items.title: Best of April 2026!
items.content_html: Your votes are in and the Best of April have been decided!Thanks to your Support, we have expanded the prize tiers this month, with bigger prizes for 1st and 2nd place movies and games. This is continuing the progress from last month, where we increase the number of prize tiers for movies, games and art.If all continues to go well, expect another boost next month with our Best of May.Top Ten Movies ($300 for 1st, $200 for 2nd, $100 for 3rd-10th + $200 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027581https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029774https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029578https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027144https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1026057https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1028051https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027845https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1030399https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1026610https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029228The top movie based on original material and winner of $500 total is WHY IS SHE WEIRD?? Congrats @HappyHarry!Thank you @matt-likes-swords for the $100 sponsorship. Play Matt’s games on Steam!Top Ten Games ($300 for 1st, $200 for 2nd, $100 for 3rd-10th + $200 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1026059https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1025974https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1030332https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1026292https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1027868https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029112https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029131https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029105https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1029239https://www.newgrounds.com/portal/view/1028822The top game based on original material and winner of $300 total is Kill Bunny. Congrats @BungerBerg and @Smarty-yippie!@FuturecopLGF made a Best Games of April post, including a video with game feedback!A $100 prize is being awarded to @Kultisti for Dice of Dusk, FutureCopLGF’s #1 for April.Thank you @MassiveMonster for the $200 sponsorship. Play Cult of the Lamb!Thank you @molkman for the $150 sponsorship. Play Lucky Tower Ultimate on Steam!Thank you @PuffballsUnited for the $100 sponsorship. Play Among Us!Top Five Music ($100 each + $100 for Best Original)https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1560710https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1555624https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1556765https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1559839https://www.newgrounds.com/audio/listen/1560908The top song based on original material and winner of $200 total is STΛRLIGHT UNITY. Congrats @ParagonX9!GREENTomFulp (aka @Aalasteir) is adding his $100 to the Silly Music Jam prize pool!Thank you @RobTop for the $500 sponsorship. Play Geometry Dash!Top Five Art ($100 for First Place, $50 each for 2nd-5th)https://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/yinyanggio/i-don-t-remember-these-tv-shows-movieshttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/kornart3/sonic-rushhttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/kornart3/sonic-the-hedgehog-2006https://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/dreaminerryday/starfoxhttps://www.newgrounds.com/art/view/theshammah/yappy-braceCongrats @YinyangGio for first place!@Ferstofus wrote a summary with reviews of every art nominee.Thank you @53xy83457 and @River for boosting our art prizes this month!Runner-Up Movies11.
